name: Floating Stats Hero
prompt_context: A modern, engaging hero section featuring a centered cut-out image, surrounded by a prominent floating social-proof badge. It features a split headline with an accent color, and a large dark floating card at the bottom containing 4 key metrics/statistics. Perfect for agencies, tech companies, or service providers. The tone must be perfectly aligned with the project's description.

content_schema.badge_text: string (Short social proof text, e.g., '50K+ Satisfied Customers')
content_schema.h1_line1: string (First part of the headline, e.g. 'Life Feels Empty Without')
content_schema.h1_accent: string (The highlighted second part of the headline, e.g. 'Beautiful Design')
content_schema.hero_image: string (A cut-out portrait or product image on a transparent background, or any subject. MUST be high-quality)

stats.label: string (Metric label derived from project goals, e.g. 'Years Experience', 'Professional Designers')

image_hints: Select a high-quality cut-out image (transparent background if possible, or isolated on white) of professional people or project subjects to sit centered behind the text and stats card.
